Place 1 teaspoon of tea for each desired cup into the teapot. Pour the boiling water into the pot, cover and let steep for 2-4 minutes. Strain and pour into your cup; add milk and natural sweeteners to taste. - Iced tea brewing method: (to make 1 liter/quart): Place 5 teaspoons of tea into a teapot or heat resistant pitcher. Pour 1 1/4 cups of freshly boiled water over the tea itself. Steep for 5 minutes. Fill a serving pitcher with 1/4 cold water. Strain and pour the tea into the serving pitcher Add ice and top-up with cold water. At Uprise Foods, a family-owned business passionate about crafting healthy, plant-based foods since 2017, we’re committed to bringing you delicious and nutritious ingredients. Our Garlic Harvest Grapeseed Oil combines the robust flavor of roasted garlic with the health benefits of antioxidant-rich grapeseed oil.

With its high smoke point, this versatile oil is perfect for high-heat cooking, roasting, or sautéing, infusing your dishes with a rich garlic flavor that elevates every meal. Its light texture and heart-healthy fats make it a great choice for those looking to support a well-balanced diet without sacrificing taste.

Whether you’re whipping up pasta, making salad dressings, roasting vegetables, or creating gourmet meals, Garlic Harvest Grapeseed Oil brings flavor and health benefits to your kitchen. Uprise Foods’ commitment to sustainability and quality ensures that each bottle is packed with flavor from quality ingredients. Try it today to enjoy a bold, garlic flavored cooking experience!
